highlights.label: Aktuell
highlights.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 04 Patch Notes
highlights.text: 3. Juni 2026: Season 04 introduces another massive season of content. Take on Operation Wall Breaker in Endgame, deploy across five new and remastered Multiplayer Maps, fight off the horde in the new Rogue Run game mode in Zombies, and much more arriving tomorrow, June 4th!

highlights.label: Geprueft
highlights.title: Automatisch aktualisiert
highlights.text: Offizielle Quellen wurden am 6. Juni 2026 um 09:30 MESZ geprueft.

highlights.label: Weitere Updates
highlights.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 04 Patch Notes
highlights.text: 3. Juni 2026: With Season 04 now live, we’re building on our anti-cheat systems to better protect players and ensure fair matches across all platforms. The following security measures are now enabled and actively enforced in-game.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 04 Patch Notes
updates.summary: Season 04 introduces another massive season of content. Take on Operation Wall Breaker in Endgame, deploy across five new and remastered Multiplayer Maps, fight off the horde in the new Rogue Run game mode in Zombies, and much more arriving tomorrow, June 4th!

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 04 Patch Notes
updates.summary: With Season 04 now live, we’re building on our anti-cheat systems to better protect players and ensure fair matches across all platforms. The following security measures are now enabled and actively enforced in-game.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 03 Patch Notes
updates.summary: MULTIPLAYER Weapons Sniper Rifles This adjustment went live on May 30 with Season 03 Reloaded but was missed in the Patch Notes. We’re adding it here to ensure visibility. Sniper Rifle Adjustments Weapon Adjustments Weapon: Strider 300 Adjustments: Strider...

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 03 Reloaded Patch Notes
updates.summary: This update focuses on underutilized attachments, with adjustments aimed at increasing overall build diversity and encouraging players to explore new options.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 03 Patch Notes
updates.summary: We’re refreshing the Exotic Weapon lineup in Black Ops Royale with 3 new additions to keep gameplay feeling dynamic and distinct. Additional Exotic Weapon updates are planned throughout the chapter.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 02 Patch Notes
updates.summary: Addressed an issue where the Mystery Box would appear broken following time travel after drawing all weapons.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 02 Reloaded Patch Notes
updates.summary: The Emotes & Sprays selection wheel experience has been improved when using a mouse to select desired Emotes of Sprays.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 02 Patch Notes
updates.summary: Iron Gauntlet [Beta] is a new competitive mode in Call of Duty: #Warzone that introduces a more demanding take on Battle Royale built around decision-making and mechanical skill.
